# Sitemap outside of any group, before the first group.
Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap-index.xml

User-agent: unknownbot
Crawl-delay: 10
Disallow: /kb/
Noindex: /kb/draft
Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap-inside-group.xml
Clean-param: sessionid

User-agent: hostbot
Host: example.com
Disallow: /mirror/
Request-rate: 1/5
Visit-time: 0600-0845

# Sitemap outside of any group, after the last group.
Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap-trailing.xml
